coreResponsibility: A plugin for the Kaltura PlayKit JS Player that provides VR/360° video playback capabilities with support for stereo mode, device motion, touch/mouse interaction, and keyboard navigation.

featureOwnership: Stereo mode toggle button in player UI
Device motion/orientation sensor handling for immersive viewing
Mouse drag and touch gesture camera control
Keyboard navigation for camera movement (WASD keys)
Camera perspective management (FOV, aspect ratio, near/far planes)
dataHandling: Three.js scene graph and renderer state
Video texture mapping to spherical geometry
Player resize event handling for canvas dimensions
VR metadata detection from media sources (tags: '360', vr object)

upstream: kaltura-player-js (player wrapper providing BasePlugin, event system, UI framework)
Media providers that supply VR metadata (sources.metadata.tags='360', sources.vr object)
downstream: Kaltura Player UI layer (stereo toggle button component)
Any application consuming the Kaltura Player with VR content

thirdPartySdks: Three.js (v0.93.0) - 3D WebGL rendering library for spherical video projection, camera control, and stereo effect

entryPoints.description: Plugin registration entry point - registers 'vr' plugin with Kaltura Player
Core VR plugin implementation - contains Vr class extending BasePlugin with all VR logic
Stereo rendering implementation using Three.js StereoCamera
IE11 workaround for video texture rendering

errorCodes.description: Device/browser does not support VR features

playerEvents.description: Fired when user toggles between VR and stereo mode

limitations: DRM content not supported with VR
playsinline must be true on iPhone
iOS 13+ requires user interaction for DeviceMotionEvent permission
